### 3. FIX WARM AND THREE-WAY TRANSFER (OVERDUE 22 DAYS)
Cold transfer is confirmed via SIP invite. Warm transfer connects but advisor gets no briefing; three-way debrief glitches. Originally scheduled with Frankie for March 29, now 22 days silent. This is the last gating bug before Mercedes or any dealership can run a warm handoff in production.

### 6. MAYA AGENT: LIVE TRANSFER ASK + PROMPT LEAKAGE FIX
Two open items on the insurance voice agent. First: add the live transfer ask into Maya's prompt so she offers to bridge to a licensed advisor when intent score crosses threshold. Second: fix the prompt leakage that still appears on non-Claude LLMs by moving model-specific instructions behind guard tokens, then regression test against Gemini 3 Flash and GPT 5.2 to confirm. Claude IQ 4.5 remains the production model but the fallback paths must be safe.

### 7. BUILD OUTBOUND RETRY + NURTURE / RESCHEDULE N8N WORKFLOWS
Two linked workflows, identified as SLA differentiators. Outbound retry: failed calls from the 75% initial connect rate loop back through N8N into the same Retell agent with exponential backoff. Nurture / reschedule: when a prospect says "call me at X time," write a timestamped row to Supabase and trigger a delayed re-call via N8N wait node. Ship both today as one N8N project since they share the retry trigger plumbing.

### 8. PHONE NUMBER FORMATTING CODE NODE ON OUTBOUND FORM
Trivial hygiene fix that keeps leaking. Drop a Code node into the outbound form workflow that normalizes dashed, undashed, and +country-code phone inputs into E.164 before the Retell call fires. 15 minutes. This has been on the list 14+ days with no blocker.

### 9. RUN RPA INSURANCE SIMULATION TEST AND LOG RESULTS
Commitment is 15 days stale. Run the RPA test today against a small batch of the 450 leads already loaded, capture connect rate, appointment rate, and any prompt leakage incidents, then write the numbers into active-projects.md under P2 and into the dashboard Insurance tab. This is the last unknown blocking the HTML email campaign and downstream lead resale pricing validation.

### 10. WEBSITE FIXES ON orayalabs.ai (BUTTONS + PRICING CLARITY)
Two small front end fixes before any paid traffic hits the site. Wire every CTA button on orayalabs.ai to its intended destination (booking, demo, pricing), and rewrite the pricing section to show estimated voice minutes per tier so prospects stop guessing. Deploy via Vercel and verify rendering on mobile Safari plus Chrome. Required before Meta or Google ad spend begins.
